error_signature: Something went wrong. Please try again.
title: Google Drive OAuth authorization error
symptom: When attempting to authorize Google Drive credentials in n8n, the user encounters a black window with the message 'Something went wrong. Please try again.'
not_this_if: The error does not occur during OAuth authorization
root_cause: This error can occur due to issues with the OAuth client configuration, such as an incorrect client secret or missing permissions in the Google Cloud Console. It may also happen if the user is not in the correct mode (test vs. production) or if the redirect URL is not properly set.
fix_steps: Ensure the Google Drive API is enabled in the Google Cloud Console.
Check that the redirect URL in the OAuth client matches the one used by n8n.
Verify that the client secret is correct.
Try authorizing again in Incognito mode.
agent_instruction: Verify the OAuth client configuration and try authorizing again in Incognito mode.
